summary: Bash: Inspect the untracked progress file
input_snippet: {"command": "ls -la memory/session-digests/ | head -20 && echo \"---\" && head -5 memory/session-digests/7d514e0d-7701-4909-8bc4-a8decdfd6fe2.progress.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -c 500", "description": "Inspect the untracked progress file"}

summary: Bash: Check if progress files are typically committed
input_snippet: {"command": "ls memory/session-digests/*.progress.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo \"---\"; git log --oneline -5 memory/session-digests/ 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo \"---\"; cat .gitignore 2>/dev/null | grep -i progress", "description": "Check if progress files are typically committed"}
